subcodes.title: Words to Mr Frosell and his brother, spoken on 1913-04-11 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: I have come here to see men and not piles of stones and clay. These buildings you can find everywhere; for my part I am searching for men.
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @human reality created in the image of God, @spiritual transformation, @goodly deeds; actions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
